# Etra: Names & Cultures — porcish language override
# Generated by generate_mod.py from config.yaml
# Fully replaces the original porcish_language definition.
# All names are 100% custom fantasy — no original mod names kept.

	color = map_ENG

	male_names = {

		# === CUSTOM FANTASY MALE NAMES ===
		# Signature porcine (Hogh-/Swyn-/Tusk-/Bor-/Grun-)

		# Anglo-Saxon classiques
		name_eadwin name_eadred name_eadric name_aelfric name_aelfgar name_aelfnoth name_ethelbeorn name_ethelred name_ethelstan name_oswin
		name_oswald name_osric name_godwin name_godric name_godred name_leofric name_leofstan name_leofwine name_cuthbeorn name_cuthred
		name_cuthwine
		# Nobles guerriers
		name_beornric name_beornstan name_beornred name_heahred name_heahstan name_baldred name_baldric name_cynric name_cynweard name_raedstan
		name_raedwine name_herewine name_heregar
		# Organiques historiques (courts/memorables)
		name_edgar name_edwy name_alfred name_offa name_penda name_ine name_cwichelm name_egbert name_eadwulf name_godhelm
		name_winstan name_osgar
	}

	female_names = {

		# === CUSTOM FANTASY FEMALE NAMES ===
		# Signature porcine (Hogh-/Swyn-/Tusk-/Bor-/Grun-)
		name_hoghgifu name_hoghswith name_hoghflaed name_swynflaed name_swynburh name_swynthryth name_tuskgifu name_tuskflaed name_boreswith name_borflaed
		name_grunthryth name_grungifu
		# Anglo-Saxon classiques
		name_eadburh name_eadgifu name_eadswith name_aelfgyth name_aelfgifu name_aelfthryth name_ethelswith name_ethelgifu name_ethelburh name_leofflaed
		name_leofgifu name_leofgyth name_cuthflaed name_cuthswith name_osthryth name_osgifu
		# Organiques historiques (courts/memorables)
		name_edith name_heahswith name_eadyth name_ealdgyth name_frideswith name_aethelflaed name_mildgifu name_beornswith name_wineflaed name_cyngifu
		name_cynswith name_osflaed
	}

	dynasty_names = {
		Acornton Mastfield Boarworth Swinestoke Sowleigh
		Tuskbury Bristlewood Wallowdale Hoggerstan Oakmire
		Snoutford Swineton Mastburne Pightleigh Pannageton
		Mastbury Boarstede Brierlstoke Ashenmire Oakworthy

	}

	lowborn = {
		Trotter Snouter Bristle Grunter Hogward Swineherd Mastling Styman
		Boarman Hoggett Sowkin Oakling Wallow Hogwatch Tuskman Boarkin
		Wainwright Barleyman Mirewalker Mudd Oakman Stanman Fenwick Thornhill
		Brakeling Heathman Wyldman Ashkin Thatcher Weldon

	location_prefix = "location_prefix_english"
	descendant_prefix = "descendant_prefix_english"

		porcish_language = {
			default = yes

		hoggish_dialect = {
			male_names = {
				name_pannager name_mastkeeper name_hogreeve name_styward name_boarmoot name_snoutred name_tuskmoot name_hoghwald name_swynnoth name_gánwulf

	}
